title: Implement minimal citation and range verifier
goal: Implement a deterministic read-only verifier for declared citations and ranges against existing RepoBrief snapshot artifacts.

acceptance.assertion: Verifier reads existing artifacts only and performs no Git, shell, refresh, snapshot creation, patch, PR or merge action.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Known citation IDs and declared ranges are resolved against allowed artifact authority, preferably canonical_md.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Missing, unresolved or hash/text-drifted citations produce fail; degraded dependencies are explicit.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Focused tests cover pass, warn, fail and degraded paths.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

metadata.created_from_plan: RepoBrief Frontdoor and Grounding Verifier v1
metadata.outcome: Implemented by Lenskit PR #932: minimal read-only answer grounding verifier core with citation, range, drift, degraded, required/recommended and non-claim checks.

verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t002-readonly: merger/lenskit/core/answer_grounding.py reads supplied paths only; PR #932 self-review records no Git/shell/refresh/snapshot/patch/PR/merge actions.
verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t002-tests: Focused tests covered pass/fail/warn/degraded/not_applicable; GitHub CI was green before merge.

checks: Lenskit PR #932 CI all green before merge
